description_long: This is a small, rustic cabin elevated on short stilts, featuring a gable roof with a greenish, textured finish. The exterior walls are decorated with a naturalistic, earth-toned pattern resembling stone and vine motifs. The front facade has a wooden porch with steps, a single wooden door with a small window, and a round window above the entrance. One side of the cabin displays a pair of shuttered windows, while the other side is mostly solid with no visible openings. The porch area includes a bucket and some wooden planks, adding to the utilitarian, lived-in feel. The overall structure is compact, with a cozy and functional design suitable for a residential or park setting.
description: A small, rustic cabin with a gable roof, wooden porch, and decorative stone-patterned walls. Features include shuttered windows, a round window, and a single front door.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a pair of shuttered windows, a small platform, a bucket, and some wooden planks beside the structure.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the main entrance with a wooden door, a round window above, a porch with steps, and a bucket to the left.
description_view_2: The left side view displays the solid wall with the stone-vine pattern, the edge of the porch, and the steps leading up to the platform.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the stone-patterned wall, a small set of steps, and the edge of the shuttered window.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhangs and a textured, greenish finish
attribute_window_arrangement: Asymmetrical arrangement with a pair of medium-sized rectangular shuttered windows on the rear, and a single small round window above the front door
attribute_door_placement: One exterior door centered on the front facade, accessible via the porch steps
